payload.text:
add label to start new chat.
rearrange the shortcuts. the shortcuts are not working.
use the modern and advanced available technologies.
move start voice input button after input box and before add files.
add a menu role="menu" label: Add after start voice input button which focuses the menuitems on click. menuitems: Files, functions the input files, YouTube Link: functions the youtube link dlg. role="menuitem".
remove add files and youtube url buttons from the main panel.
only keep 4 prompts. refine those prompts.
mainly, focus on new menu and menuitems and focus strategy and correct shortcut using.

**Prioritizing AI Assistant Enhancements**

I'm focusing on the AI assistant update requests. First, I'll add a label for a new chat button. Second, I'll rearrange shortcuts and troubleshoot the non-functional shortcuts, probably involving keyboard event handling and shortcut logic. Lastly, I'll identify applicable modern technologies for the update.


**Refining Button Placement**

I'm now prioritizing the UI/UX improvements. The voice input button will move after the input box and before the "add files" action. I'm focusing on the requested menu, which will contain files and youtube. The "Add Files" and "Add YouTube" buttons will be removed from the main panel. This involves careful parsing of the layout change and a new "Add" menu button.


**Implementing New Menu Functionality**

I'm now implementing the new "Add" menu feature, focusing on menu items for "Files" and "YouTube Link", each with `role="menuitem"`. I'm designing a focus strategy where clicking "Add" activates the menu items. I'm also addressing shortcut fixes, including verifying `preventDefault` for shortcut conflicts. I'm adding tooltips for the shortcuts to enhance user understanding. Lastly, I'm working to refine the existing prompts down to the final four.


**Mapping Shortcut Requests**

I've revised the shortcut mapping to align with user requests, favoring a logical arrangement. I'm assigning `Alt+N` to new chat, `Alt+/` for input focus, `Alt+V` for voice input, and `Alt+A` to open the "Add" menu. I'll test Ctrl+Enter and ensure it triggers appropriately, and I'll keep the standard behavior for the enter key.


**Updating UI Component Tasks**

I'm now integrating the "Start New Chat" label with an icon for the button within `App.tsx`. I will verify the text visibility, potentially including a tooltip with the relevant shortcut. Next, I'm refining the existing prompts down to four high-quality options within `App.tsx`. Lastly, I'm verifying the new button placement within `components/ChatInput.tsx`.



**Defining UI/UX Elements**

I'm now detailing the component specifications. Specifically, `ChatInput.tsx` now has a state for `isMenuOpen` and `activeIndex`, along with defining its nested UI elements with detailed behaviors. `App.tsx` focuses on defined shortcuts, `Alt+N` and `Alt+/`, and the new chat button.


**Refining Menu Accessibility**

I'm now focusing on menu accessibility within `ChatInput.tsx`, ensuring proper ARIA attributes. I've integrated menu keyboard navigation and refined the shortcut mapping within `App.tsx`, while also implementing a global event listener for shortcuts. Specifically, I've updated the "New Chat" button and the `SIMPLE_PROMPTS` within `App.tsx`. I've added icons and removed the direct buttons in `ChatInput.tsx`.


I'm now implementing the latest shortcut strategy, prioritizing `Alt+S` (Send), and integrating the refined prompts and re-arranging the toolbar within the chat input component. In `App.tsx`, I'm working to update the global keydown handler for new prompts and the new chat button. I'm focusing on the drop-down menu and shortcut handling within the `ChatInput.tsx` component, including implementing a focus strategy for the menu.


**Prioritizing Shortcut Updates**

I'm now implementing the latest requested shortcut changes. I'm focusing on the `ChatInput.tsx` component, specifically updating the keyboard shortcut behaviors. I'm assigning `Alt+S` to Send, `Alt+A` to Add Menu, and `Alt+V` to Voice input. I'm also addressing the menu's state and accessibility, including focus management when the menu is opened. I'm preparing the XML for these changes.


**Finalizing Accessibility Adjustments**

I've finalized UI and UX updates, refining the global shortcut mapping within `App.tsx` and updating the new chat button label to "Start New Chat (Alt+N)". The toolbar within `ChatInput.tsx` is redesigned with a voice button and the "Add" menu. This new menu houses file and YouTube options, including improved accessibility.


**Generating New Prompt Options**

I'm now generating new prompts and implementing them. Specifically, I am focusing on summarizing a YouTube video and drafting a professional client email. These additions and the updated shortcuts and the UI enhancements, have been validated and updated in the XML file, and within `App.tsx` and `ChatInput.tsx`.


**Focusing Menu Interactions**

I'm now focusing on the "Add" button and menu interactions, implementing `useEffect` to manage focus within the menu when opened. This ensures that the menu items are focused on click, improving the UX. The updated layout will be: Input Box, then Voice Input, then Add Menu. Finally, I'm re-evaluating the shortcut strategy.


**Implementing Menu Shortcuts**

I'm now prioritizing the new shortcut implementation for the menu. I'll assign `Alt+M` to open the "Add" menu. I'll test it carefully and ensure `preventDefault` works as expected, especially in text input. I'll focus on UI updates within `App.tsx` and `ChatInput.tsx`. I'll also add visual tooltips and titles to clarify the new shortcuts for the user.


**Integrating New Prompt Additions**

I'm now integrating the new prompt additions within `App.tsx`, and I'm ensuring smooth handling of keyboard shortcuts, particularly `Alt+N` and `Alt+/`, and the enhanced "New Chat" button. The four refined prompt options have also been incorporated.


**Implementing Focus Enhancements**

I'm now implementing `useEffect` within `App.tsx` to handle global keydown events for focus management. I've integrated `Alt+/` for input focus and `Alt+N` for new chat. I've also added an alert for user feedback. I'm ensuring smooth UI interactions.


**Refining Alert Interactions**

I'm now refining the alert interactions and the new chat process. I'm focusing on the UX, specifically on confirming new chat initiation, including ensuring focus is correctly returned to the chat input after starting a new chat. I've integrated this into the `handleNewChat` function. I'm implementing alert updates for user clarity.


**Updating Streamed Response Handling**

I'm now focusing on improving the streamed Gemini response. I'm incorporating the grounding chunks to the new history. I am currently working on error handling, and making sure the `isLoading` state is set correctly. The messages are updated dynamically, including the `isComplete` flag, after each streamed update and completion.


**Improving Error Handling**

I'm now focusing on robust error handling within the streamed Gemini responses. I am incorporating error grounding chunks and ensuring accurate updates to history, and proper management of the loading state. I'm dynamically updating messages, and setting the isComplete flag accordingly. I'm updating the UI when errors occur to ensure a great UX.


**Refining Shortcut Integration**

I'm now integrating the new shortcut for opening the "Add" menu, which is Alt+M. I'm carefully testing its implementation. I'm verifying the `preventDefault` behavior and updating the UI accordingly with tooltips and titles for clarity. I am focusing on updates in `App.tsx` and `ChatInput.tsx`.


**Implementing Prompt Interface**

I'm now implementing the prompt interface for summarizing YouTube videos and drafting professional emails. I'm focusing on user experience, and have finalized the shortcut, Alt+M. The UI updates are validated and implemented in the XML file, `App.tsx`, and `ChatInput.tsx`.


**Finalizing UI Enhancements**

I'm now finalizing the user interface enhancements within `ChatInput.tsx`. I've completed the toolbar with the voice button, followed by the "Add" menu. The `isLoading` state is managed to provide proper visual feedback during data loading and streaming responses. I'm also ensuring a seamless experience for new chat initiation.


**Managing Input States**

I'm now managing input states within `ChatInput.tsx`, focusing on the `isLoading` state for the UI, file selection, YouTube links, and URL understanding. I've also incorporated voice input functionality, including recording and transcription states using `useRef`. I am also working on `isYtModalOpen` and `isMenuOpen` states.


**Refining Focus Behavior**

I'm now focusing on the focus management within `ChatInput.tsx`. I've implemented `useRef` for the text area, file input, and menu. I'm ensuring the first menu item receives focus upon opening the menu, using a small timeout for proper rendering. I'm also addressing click-outside to close the menu.


**Implementing Voice Input Integration**

I'm now integrating the voice input features within `ChatInput.tsx`. I've implemented the start and stop recording functionality using `useRef` for the media recorder. I've also incorporated the streaming transcription of the voice input. I'm focusing on handling the states for recording, transcription, and errors.


**Improving Voice Input Functionality**

I'm now implementing the voice input's core logic within `ChatInput.tsx`. I'm starting and stopping recordings using `mediaRecorderRef.current`. I'm handling recording and transcription states and triggering `transcribeAudio` to send the file. Error handling is also included to provide a better user experience.


**Refining Input Interaction**

I'm now implementing new keydown events for user input within `ChatInput.tsx`. I've added a shortcut `Alt+S` for send. The `Alt+A` shortcut toggles the "Add" menu, and `Alt+V` toggles voice input. I'm focusing on handling enter key presses with or without the shift key, and I've also incorporated file changes.



**Implementing Menu Escape**

I'm now focusing on menu interaction and accessibility within `ChatInput.tsx`. I've implemented an Escape key handler, so pressing `Escape` closes the menu, ensuring focus returns to the text area. I'm also ensuring the text area resizes according to the input's content, which is dynamic.



**Enhancing File Interactions**

I'm now implementing file interaction refinements. I've focused on UI for displaying and removing selected files. The UI includes the filename and a remove button with a tooltip for clarity. I am also working on display YT links. I am focusing on seamless interactions with file selection.



**Updating File Interactions**

I'm now focusing on enhanced user experience within `ChatInput.tsx` regarding YouTube interactions. I've designed the UI to display YouTube links. It will display the link and a remove option. The remove function uses a `filter` function to update the list of YT links. I'm focusing on seamless display and removal of selected links, ensuring a smooth and intuitive flow.


**Refining File Upload Logic**

I'm now refining the file upload interactions in `ChatInput.tsx`, focusing on `handleFileChange`. I've ensured seamless updates to display the selected files, including filenames, with remove buttons. I've also incorporated error handling for unsupported file types.



**Integrating Voice Input UI**

I'm now integrating the voice input UI, including a button with visual indicators for recording and transcription states. I've disabled the button while loading or transcribing, and focused on using appropriate styles for the different states. The voice button also shows stop or voice based on the `isRecording` state.


**Implementing Menu Shortcuts Refinement**

I'm now implementing the latest "Add" menu shortcut refinements within `ChatInput.tsx`. I've focused on `aria-haspopup` for semantic accessibility. I've integrated `Alt+A` to toggle the menu open/closed, carefully testing with the `useRef` hook and focus. I'm prioritizing user experience with keyboard navigation.



**Implementing Menu Functionality**

I'm now implementing file upload and YouTube link functionality. I've integrated buttons for "Upload Files" and "YouTube Link" within the "Add" menu. The buttons, styled for accessibility, trigger the appropriate actions, opening the file selection dialog or the YouTube modal and closing the menu.


**Prioritizing URL Understanding Integration**

I'm now integrating the URL understanding toggle button within `ChatInput.tsx`, ensuring proper handling of the `isUrlUnderstanding` state. I've designed the button with visual indicators and disabled it during recording, focusing on accessibility with titles. I am also working on `handleSubmit`.

entries.description: Updated prompts to 4 refined options, improved shortcut handling (Alt+N, Alt+/), and enhanced New Chat button visibility.
Implemented new toolbar layout with "Add" menu, Voice button first, and updated accessibility/shortcuts.

payload.text:
move the url understanding to add menu.
when menu is clicked and menuitem is focused, the other menuitems like youtube link and url understanding should be found via navigating by down arrow key not tab. correctly make accessible.
add a button "Edit" after copy button for prompt which lets the users to edit that prompt in the input box. correctly functioning. set focus to input box.

entries.description: Added 'Edit' button for user messages to allow repopulating the input with the prompt text.
Passed edit handler to MessageBubble to allow editing sent prompts.
Moved URL Understanding to Add menu with proper keyboard navigation (arrow keys) and state indication.
